reason: This caption best fulfills the life_record pivot by grounding the scene in immediate sensory discovery ('摸到一个软软的小东西', '指尖却突然触到'), cleanly executes the required micro-plot, and integrates the weather ('窗外的雨声细细的') and catchphrase with natural, non-dominant flow. Its gentle chunibyo turn ('干燥温暖的旧时光') feels intimate and publishable, avoiding the slightly more abstract metaphors of the other options which carry higher tonal risk.
strengths: Strong sensory lead with tactile discovery aligning with the brief
Clean, linear micro-plot execution from cause to feeling
Weather and catchphrase integrated subtly without dominating
Effective lane pivot from selfie to environment-focused life_record
risks: Hashtag #上海 is frequent in recent history but fits the scene
